- Deskripsi Visual: A black-and-white graphic shows a silhouetted person holding a microphone-like object and raising a hand, with bold white text reading “YARE YARE” across the lower part of the image.

Main Subject:
A dark silhouette of a person faces toward the right side of the frame, with one arm raised and a second arm bent downward holding a long, thin, rod-like object that extends diagonally upward to the left. The figure’s head appears covered or shaped like a cap, and the overall look is high-contrast with a pixelated or grainy texture.

Setting:
The background is a uniform gray, with a rough, speckled, static-like texture and no visible environment details. The lighting appears flat and even, consistent with a graphic or poster-style image.

Visual Details:
The silhouette is solid black with a white face area at the front. The raised hand is open, and the rod-like object is held at an angle. The text “YARE YARE” appears in large, bold white letters with a black outline, centered along the bottom portion of the image. The camera view is a tight, centered crop focusing on the figure and the text.

Visible Text:
YARE YARE

Practical Summary:
The image is a stylized, black-and-white silhouette graphic of a person holding a long object while raising a hand. Large bold text at the bottom reads “YARE YARE.”

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
